claim_text: Honda plans to build an annual EV production capacity of over 2 million units by 2030.
source_title: [EDINET] 有価証券報告書 第100期 (FY2023 Annual Report)
span_text: 年間200万台を超えるＥＶ生産体制を構築し

claim_text: Honda aims for a global EV and FCEV sales ratio of 100% by 2040.
source_title: [EDINET] 有価証券報告書 第100期 (FY2023 Annual Report)
span_text: 2040年までにＥＶ・ＦＣＥＶ(燃料電池自動車)販売比率をグローバルで100％とすることをめざしています

claim_text: Honda plans to invest a total of 10 trillion yen in capital expenditure and R&D over 10 years starting from FY2021 to build the 2030 EV production system.
source_title: [EDINET] 有価証券報告書 第100期 (FY2023 Annual Report)
span_text: 2030年にＥＶ200万台生産体制の構築に向けて、2021年度からの10年間で、設備投資と研究開発費などで合わせて10兆円の資源投入を計画しています

claim_text: Honda plans to launch the Honda 0 Series, its first model based on a proprietary EV platform, starting in North America in 2026.
source_title: [EDINET] 有価証券報告書 第100期 (FY2023 Annual Report)
span_text: 「Ｈｏｎｄａ ０シリーズ」の第１弾となるモデルを、2026年より北米市場を皮切りに、グローバル各地域にて発売予定

claim_text: Honda aims to sell 4 million electric motorcycles globally annually by 2030.
source_title: [EDINET] 有価証券報告書 第100期 (FY2023 Annual Report)
span_text: 2030年にはラインナップをさらに拡充し、400万台の販売をめざします

claim_text: Honda acknowledges that the differentiation based on engine performance, a traditional strength, is becoming difficult as the EV market sees a variety of products.
source_title: [EDINET] 有価証券報告書 第100期 (FY2023 Annual Report)
span_text: 四輪事業においては、ＥＶ(電気自動車)市場に多種多様な製品が投入され、これまでHondaが強みとしてきたエンジン等のデバイス性能による差別化が難しくなっています

claim_text: Honda warns of potential battery price surges due to shortages of raw materials like nickel, lithium, and cobalt as EV demand expands.
source_title: [EDINET] 有価証券報告書 第100期 (FY2023 Annual Report)
span_text: 今後は、電動化の加速により、バッテリーに用いられるニッケル、リチウム、コバルトの需要が急拡大するとともに、鉱物など原材料の供給不足によるバッテリー価格の高騰が懸念されます

claim_text: Honda plans to start mass production of batteries in North America via a joint venture with LG Energy Solution in 2025.
source_title: [EDINET] 有価証券報告書 第100期 (FY2023 Annual Report)
span_text: 北米ではＬＧエナジーソリューションとの合弁会社で2025年からバッテリーの量産を開始予定です

claim_text: Honda aims to launch a mass production model based on the 'Ye GT Concept' in China within 2025.
source_title: [EDINET] 有価証券報告書 第100期 (FY2023 Annual Report)
span_text: 「イエＧＴ ＣＯＮＣＥＰＴ」をベースとした量産モデルを2025年内に発売予定

claim_text: Honda plans to launch 10 EV models in China by 2027.
source_title: [EDINET] 有価証券報告書 第100期 (FY2023 Annual Report)
span_text: 上記５モデルを含め、2027年までに10機種のＥＶを投入予定

claim_text: Honda signed a memorandum with Nissan in March 2024 to explore a strategic partnership for electrification and intelligence.
source_title: [EDINET] 有価証券報告書 第100期 (FY2023 Annual Report)
span_text: 2024年３月15日に日産自動車株式会社との間で自動車の電動化・知能化に向けて戦略的パートナーシップの検討を開始する覚書を締結しました

claim_text: Honda reported consolidated operating income of 1.38 trillion yen for FY2023, a 77% increase from the previous year.
source_title: [EDINET] 有価証券報告書 第100期 (FY2023 Annual Report)
span_text: 営業利益は、諸経費の増加などはあったものの、売価およびコスト影響や販売影響による利益増などにより、１兆3,819億円と前連結会計年度にくらべ77.0％の増益となりました

claim_text: Honda reported a 14.4% decrease in operating income for the Automotive segment in the first half of FY2024 compared to the same period last year.
source_title: [EDINET] 半期報告書 第101期 (H1 FY2024 Semi-Annual Report)
span_text: 営業利益は、売価およびコスト影響による利益増などはあったものの、諸経費や研究開発費の増加などにより、2,580億円と前年同期にくらべ14.4％の減益となりました

claim_text: Honda's consolidated net income attributable to the parent company decreased by 19.7% in the first half of FY2024 compared to the same period last year.
source_title: [EDINET] 半期報告書 第101期 (H1 FY2024 Semi-Annual Report)
span_text: 親会社の所有者に帰属する中間利益は、4,946億円と前年同期にくらべ19.7％の減益となりました

claim_text: Honda's R&D expenditure for the first half of FY2024 was 478.5 billion yen.
source_title: [EDINET] 半期報告書 第101期 (H1 FY2024 Semi-Annual Report)

claim_text: Honda aims to achieve 100% EV sales ratio in China by 2035.
source_title: [EDINET] 有価証券報告書 第100期 (FY2023 Annual Report)
span_text: 中国においては、2027年までにＥＶを10機種投入し、2035年までにＥＶ販売比率100％の達成をめざしています

claim_text: Honda plans to launch the Honda 0 Series globally with 7 models by 2030.
source_title: [EDINET] 有価証券報告書 第100期 (FY2023 Annual Report)
span_text: 「Ｈｏｎｄａ ０シリーズ」は、2026年に北米での上市を皮切りに、2030年までに小型から中大型モデルまで、グローバルで７モデルの投入を予定しています

claim_text: Honda plans to launch a solid-state battery in the late 2020s.
source_title: [EDINET] 有価証券報告書 第100期 (FY2023 Annual Report)
span_text: 全固体電池については、2024年に栃木県さくら市での実証ラインを立ち上げ、2020年代後半の市場投入をめざし、取り組みを加速させていきます

claim_text: Honda acknowledges risks associated with business partnerships and joint ventures, including potential disagreements, technology leakage, and delays in decision-making.
source_title: [EDINET] 有価証券報告書 第100期 (FY2023 Annual Report)
span_text: 業務提携・合弁において、当事者間における利害の不一致、利益や技術の流出、意思決定の遅れ、業務提携・合弁先の業績不振が生じた場合、あるいは業務提携・合弁の内容に関する変更や解消が生じた場合、当社グループの事業、業績に悪影響を与える可能性があります

claim_text: Honda's Power Products segment sales volume decreased by 32.5% in FY2023 compared to the previous year.
source_title: [EDINET] 有価証券報告書 第100期 (FY2023 Annual Report)
span_text: 当連結会計年度のパワープロダクツ事業の連結売上台数は、米国などで販売が減少したことにより、381万２千台と前連結会計年度にくらべ32.5％の大幅な減少となりました

claim_text: Honda stated that the Honda 0 Series EVs will begin introductions in 2026, with the 0 SUV scheduled for the first half of 2026 in North America.
source_title: Honda 0 Series EVs: What's Confirmed, What's Still Concept, and What to ...
span_text: Hondasays introductions start in 2026, with the 0 SUV scheduled first in North America in the first half of 2026

claim_text: Honda's EV sales in 2024 were 64,444 units, accounting for 23% of its global sales alongside 868,265 hybrids.
source_title: Honda Downshifts on Its EV Goals Amid Trade, Sales Woes
span_text: ThoughHonda'sworldwidesalestook a 4.6% dip to 3.81 million vehicles in2024, it sold 64,444EVsand 868,265 hybrids, accounting for 23% of its globalsales.

claim_text: Honda's EV business is expected to lose about $4.48 billion in the full fiscal year.
source_title: Honda's EV Sales Plunged-And GM Could Be The Surprise Winner
span_text: Honda'sEVbusiness is expected to lose about $4.48 billion in the full fiscal year

claim_text: Honda's profit for the nine months through December dropped 42% compared to a year earlier, mainly due to U.S. tariffs and a changing EV market.
source_title: Honda Profit Falls 42% as EV Slowdown and U.S. Tariffs Take a Toll
span_text: HondaMotor Company said its profit for the nine months through December dropped 42% compared to a year earlier, mainly because of U.S. tariffs and a changingEVmarket.

source_title: Honda's Great EV Reset: The 0-Series "Alpha" Arrives to Prove the Giant ...
span_text: Honda, late to theEVparty but rich from hybrid sales, has unveiled its0-Series"Alpha" SUV.

claim_text: The Honda 0 SUV is expected to be the first Honda 0 Series model to enter production based on a newly developed dedicated EV architecture.
source_title: Honda 0 SUV Prototype Makes Global Public Debut at Red Bull Event with ...
span_text: TheHonda0 SUV is expected to be the firstHonda0Seriesmodel to enter production based on the company's newly developed dedicatedEVarchitecture.

claim_text: Honda's operating profit substantially decreased mainly due to one-time EV-related expenses and tariff impacts.
source_title: [PDF] Honda Corporate Update 2025 Fall
span_text: Despite the positive effect of price revisions and other factors, operating profit substantially decreased mainly due to one-time EV-related expenses and tariff ...

claim_text: Global auto sales growth is expected to be limited in 2025, with Western Europe delivering subdued performance.
source_title: We anticipate another year of sluggishgrowthfor theglobalcarmarket
span_text: We expect limitedgrowthforglobalautosalesin 2025, with many uncertainties. Looking to 2025, we expect Western Europe to deliver another subdued performance, withgrowthof just 1.0%

claim_text: Honda's 0 Series marks a bold reset for the automaker with a clean-sheet EV platform.
source_title: Honda's Next 0 Series SUV Breaks Cover and It Points ... - MotorTrend
span_text: With futuristic styling and a clean-sheetEVplatform,Honda's0Seriesmarks a bold reset for the automaker.
